goal: Track when Phase 2 can move from active work into closeout-candidate, frozen, and closed states so new package creation stops through repo policy instead of transcript-only instructions.
successCriteria: Phase policy supports active, closeout-candidate, frozen, and closed states for Phase 2.
Package creation rejects new Phase 2 packages once the phase is frozen or closed.
Repo-facing reports can explain the current Phase 2 state and why new packages are allowed or blocked.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Defining Phase 3 feature scope inside the Phase 2 closeout policy package.
Changing module maturity or promotion decisions directly.
